title: calylophus hartwegii var. pubescens
intro: Calylophus hartwegii var. pubescens, also known as the hairy Calylophus, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calylophus hartwegii var. pubescens include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
